text.title: Programmatic SEO Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is data source ≥80% quality AND refresh cadence ≤90 days?

branch.question: Is intent-template map defined for ≥2 intents?

conclusion.verdict: design intent-template map first; defer launch

text.example: quality=95, refresh=30d, intent-template map for compare + list → launch tier 1.
